hero_subtitle: SFTY Business helps VASP leadership maintain audit-ready records by linking decisions, rationale and evidence within a unified compliance operating layer.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Executives and compliance leaders struggle to preserve decision rationales linked to consistent audit evidence. This gap makes it difficult to demonstrate defensible approval histories and weakens operational risk control across compliance workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes decision logs, reviewer rationale, case history and audit evidence into one operational layer so executives can demonstrate defensible approvals with clear traceability and risk context.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to defensible decisions
workflow_description: SFTY organizes provider checks into structured cases with documented reviews, decisions and preserved evidence to support audit-ready compliance controls.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented decisions. Clear approval evidence
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides VASP executives with a provider-neutral layer that preserves approval decisions, links rationale to evidence, and strengthens audit-ready compliance visibility.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP executives by preserving audit-ready evidence and orchestrating compliance providers to enable clear risk visibility and scalable enterprise governance.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY preserve defensible approval decisions and evidence
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how approval workflows capture decision rationale and audit logs
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports compliance review and oversight
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY improves risk visibility for executive decision control
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk control?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives with one operational view across compliance decisions, workflows, risk signals and audit evidence to reduce operational risk and improve oversight of digital asset compliance.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY preserve approval decision evidence?
faq_2_answer: SFTY records approval decisions alongside supporting data, reviewer actions, rules applied and case evidence to support decisions have clear rationale and traceable documentation.
faq_3_question: Can SFTY provide audit-ready compliance trails?
faq_3_answer: Yes. SFTY maintains structured logs of alerts, cases, decisions, rule changes and evidence to support review readiness and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: How does SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: SFTY sits above existing providers and compliance tools, connecting their outputs into connected workflows without requiring replacement or disrupting current stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC, KYT, Travel Rule or screening providers but connects their outputs into a structured operational compliance layer.
final_title: Preserve approval decisions with audit-ready evidence
final_description: Review how SFTY structures compliance workflows to capture rationale, link evidence and strengthen executive risk visibility for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
